## Type of change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)

- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps change
- [ ] Clinical review implementation (changes driven by a clinical review issue)

## Checklist

<!-- All items marked [x] are required before a review can be requested. -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (Black / isort for Python; ESLint + Prettier for TypeScript; dart format for Flutter).
- [ ] I have added or updated docstrings for all new public functions and classes.
- [ ] Test coverage is at or above 80% for the files I changed.
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation if this PR changes behavior.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new linting warnings or errors.
- [ ] This PR does not include real patient data of any kind (not in code, comments, tests, or fixtures).
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
